events.name: Crystal Palace at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: Crystal Palace winger Ismaila Sarr scored a brace as his side beat arch-rivals Brighton & Hove Albion 3-1 at the Amex Stadium on Sunday, handing the Seagulls their first home defeat in the Premier League this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sarr double sees Palace down Brighton in rivalry

headlines.description: Manchester United poured on the misery for Manchester City as late goals by Bruno Fernandes and Amad Diallo snatched an unlikely 2-1 away victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Diallo snatches derby win for Man Utd at Man City

headlines.description: Chelsea moved within two points of leaders Liverpool in the Premier League on Sunday as goals from Marc Cucurella and Nicolas Jackson earned them victory over Brentford.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea beat Brentford, cut into gap to Liverpool

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur scored five goals in the opening half of a Premier League game for the first time in their history as they thrashed bottom club Southampton 5-0 away on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tottenham hit 5 in 1st half to thrash Southampton
